page.title: Census Data
page.description: Official national figures for Hazara ancestry and the Hazaragi language in Australia.
page.sectionHeading: Official Census Numbers for Australian Hazaras
page.whyHeading: A strong count builds a stronger future.
page.whyDescription: The Census helps show how communities are represented and how resources are planned.

benefits.title: Fair Representation
benefits.description: An accurate count helps ensure our community is seen and our voices are heard.

benefits.title: Better Services
benefits.description: Stronger numbers help support schools, health care, roads and local services.

benefits.title: More Resources
benefits.description: Funding and programs can be informed by accurate community information.

benefits.title: Stronger Future
benefits.description: Today’s count helps shape opportunities and outcomes for tomorrow.
